author: y4rr
content: Audit follow-up #3/5 vision-A (#689) APPROVE — opus 4.7 closed the ~80-site NumCast unwrap cluster across 14 files in ferrotorch-vision. Used the workspace-shared ferrotorch_core::numeric_cast::cast helper (from #685). Audit-pattern grep AFTER returns 0 hits in non-test code (down from ~80 baseline). 10 files import the cast helper; 14 files modified total (callsite cascading + ? insertion + occasional signature widening). cargo build PASS, 333/333 vision tests PASS, workspace build PASS. Subagent report truncated mid-summary but diff state confirms work landed (architect re-verified independently per protocol — subagent claims aren't trusted anyway). Scope-narrowing check NO — remaining vision .unwrap() sites are non-NumCast (Option/Result helpers, test code, registry mutex paths) which the audit didn't cite as part of this cluster. Architect-mode running tally: 7 dispatches total, 6 clean APPROVEs (mps, distributions, item 8, core-2a, core-2b, vision-A), 1 truncation+split (core-1), 1 redirect (item 8). Truncation note: vision-A nearly truncated too, suggests opus dispatches need to be even tighter for crates with many file-cascading edits. Crates done: 1/5 mps, 2/5 core, 3/5 vision-A. Next: vision-B (assert!→Result + RwLock + synthetic + lint baseline + 🟡/🟢 items), then crate 4/5 (optim), then crate 5/5 (llama).
